Giá trị cốt lõi của Vũ Thảo Technology tâm niệm kinh doanh là cùng nhau phát triển. Khách hàng phát triển –  Cán bộ nhân viên Vũ Thảo phát triển – Vũ Thảo phát triển.

name: Naiscorp
specialties: Digital Transformation, AI-ML Development, Big data, Mobile Apps, SAAS, Robotics, Service Robot, AI Robotics, Robot as a Service
description:
English – Overview

Naiscorp is a Vietnam-based technology group founded in 2006. We help enterprises accelerate digital transformation with AI/ML, big data, and modern software. Over 19 years we built consumer/enterprise apps served total 120M+ users including incubated ventures such as VGS, Vbee, Cozrum, and Ezin.

Naiscorp Robotics is our robotics division, positioned as a Developer and Provider of Integrated – Customized Robotics Solutions. We (1) customize third-party robot platforms to local languages, workflows, and IT systems (HIS/CRM/BMS/LMS), and (2) design and build original AI-powered service robots, including the Health Companion Robot and service robots for airports, hotels, hospitals, and public services. Our stack features on-device AI, custom AI boards, and secure fleet management. We are expanding to North America with local partnerships while keeping core R&D in Vietnam.

Tiếng Việt – Tổng quan

Naiscorp là tập đoàn công nghệ tại Việt Nam, thành lập năm 2006. Chúng tôi thúc đẩy chuyển đổi số bằng AI/ML, dữ liệu lớn và phần mềm hiện đại. Sau 19+ năm, Naiscorp đã xây dựng các ứng dụng tiêu dùng và doanh nghiệp phục vụ khoảng  120 triệu+ người dùng bao gồm ươm tạo các startup như VGS, Vbee, Cozrum, Ezin.

Naiscorp Robotics là đơn vị robot của Naiscorp, định vị Nhà phát triển và cung cấp giải pháp tích hợp – tùy chỉnh robot. Chúng tôi (1) tùy chỉnh các nền tảng robot có sẵn theo ngôn ngữ, quy trình nghiệp vụ và tích hợp hệ thống khách hàng (HIS/CRM/BMS/LMS); đồng thời (2) tự thiết kế và sản xuất robot dịch vụ tích hợp AI, gồm Health Companion Robot và các robot cho sân bay, khách sạn, bệnh viện, hành chính công. Nền tảng nổi bật: on-device AI, AI board tự thiết kế, quản lý đội robot an toàn. Naiscorp Robotics đang mở rộng sang Bắc Mỹ qua hợp tác địa phương, giữ R&D chủ lực tại Việt Nam.

name: Cloud Computing Technologies (CCT AI)
specialties: CVE Verified Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB), Cloud Computing, AWS GovCloud, FedRAMP, Application Refactoring, Microservices, DevSecOps, Regulatory Compliance, Software Factory, Systems Security Plans, GSA Multiple Award Schedule (MAS) 47QTCA23D000J, Highly Adaptive Cybersecurity Services, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, Neural Networks, Natural Language Processing, Predictive Analytics, Reinforcement Learning, Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), Zero Trust Architecture, JWCC Cloud
description:
Cloud Computing Technologies (CCT) is a U.S. federal IT, cloud computing, and artificial intelligence services firm operating under Castillo Technologies, LLC, delivering mission-critical solutions to the Department of Defense and U.S. civilian agencies for more than 20 years.

CCT holds a GSA Multiple Award Schedule (MAS) contract – 47QTCA23D000J under SIN 518210C (Cloud Computing Services), 54151HACS (Highly Adaptive Cybersecurity Services), and 54151S (IT Professional Services), enabling U.S. government agencies to procure CCT’s services directly for AI, cloud, cybersecurity, and digital modernization programs.

With over 180+ federal and DoD prime contracts and task orders supporting organizations such as the U.S. Department of Defense, Army, Air Force, Homeland Security, Veterans Affairs, and Health & Human Services, CCT has delivered secure, compliant, and scalable platforms across classified, regulated, and high-impact mission environments.

CCT specializes in AWS GovCloud, Databricks, Zero Trust Architecture, DevSecOps, FedRAMP, cloud migration, data engineering, and Generative AI, enabling federal agencies to modernize legacy systems, deploy AI-driven analytics, and operationalize large-scale machine learning in secure production environments.

Our teams design and deploy AI-enabled cloud architectures, secure data platforms, RAG-based LLM systems, cybersecurity automation, and enterprise DevSecOps pipelines that meet DoD, FedRAMP, and federal compliance requirements while accelerating mission outcomes.

Cloud Computing Technologies is a registered trademark of Castillo Technologies, LLC, a SBA-certified Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB).

name: Cloud Computing Association جمعية الحوسبة السحابية
description:
The Cloud Computing Association was established in 2019 by a group of specialists. It is a non-profit civil association licensed by the National Center for Non-Profit Sector Development under license No. 1543 dated 29-10-2019. It operates under the supervision of the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology.

Our Mission:
To lead and empower the cloud computing sector in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Vision:
To be the first association in the Kingdom that promotes and deepens the concept of cloud computing, and contributes to building national capabilities and partnerships with the public and private sectors.

تم إنشاء جمعية الحوسبة السحابية السعودية في عام 2019 من قبل مجموعة من المختصين، وهي جمعية أهلية غير ربحية مرخصة من المركز الوطني لتنمية القطاع غير الربحي برقم 1543 وتاريخ 29-10-2019م، وتعمل تحت إشراف وزارة الاتصالات وتقنية المعلومات.

الرسالة:
القيادة والتمكين لقطاع الحوسبة السحابية في المملكة العربية السعودية.

الرؤية:
أن تكون أول جمعية في المملكة تعزز وتعمق مفهوم الحوسبة السحابية وتساهم في بناء القدرات الوطنية والشراكات مع القطاعين العام والخاص.

specialties: Startup Ecosystem Research, Public Policy Development, Startup Ecosystem Development, Angel Investment, Venture Capital, Growth Mentorship, Economic Development, Management Consulting, Entrepreneurship Education, Strategy, Leadership, Regional Change, Globalization, Entrepreneurship, Startups, Tech, Intellectual Property
description:
Startup Genome is the world-leading innovation ecosystem development organization, having worked with more than 180 economic and innovation ministries and public/private agencies in over 65 countries. We work to catalyze startup success and ecosystem growth and ensure that all cities and countries capture their fair share of the new economy. Startup Genome strategy clients grew their ecosystem values 59% faster than peers (41% vs. 25%). On average, Startup Genome clients produced $1.4 billion per year more in ecosystem value from an average starting point of $9.2 billion. Our evidence-based ecosystem research, advisory, and scaleup programs are rooted in global experience with the world’s largest AI-curated startup dataset and proprietary instruments developed from over a decade of primary research.

Get in touch: contact@startupgenome.com

specialties: Startup Growth, Entrepreneurial Ecosystem, Coworking, Startup Business Acceleration, Business Advisory Services, Business Consulting, Business Strategy & Planning, Accelerator, Startup Communities, Technology, Entrepreneurship, Events, Education
description:
Through united efforts, the Startup Junkie team is improving lives through innovation and entrepreneurship. 

Startup Junkie Consulting marked its beginnings in 2008 and formally organized as an LLC in 2011 by offering consulting services at no-cost to entrepreneurs. In order to expand the reach, impact, and depth of services, Startup Junkie Foundation was born in 2015. 

As two companies sharing the same purpose, mission, vision, and values, the team is jointly building entrepreneurial ecosystems in Northwest Arkansas through providing no-cost, one-on-one consulting; events, workshops, and programs; and access to capital and talent.

name: Startup Pedia
specialties: Storytelling, Branding, Marketing Services, Startup Story
description:
Startup Pedia is a digital media platform that started in 2019 with the simple goal of making entrepreneurship mainstream.

Five years and numerous startup stories later, we can confidently say that we’ve really hit the mark.

At Startup Pedia, we bring real-life stories of entrepreneurship, startups, businesses, and founders closer to everyone. So that they receive the coverage they deserve and people get inspired to take action on that tucked-away dream of building something of their own.

Most of what we cover comes from every corner of India (sometimes even the world). 

Our founder, Md Noor Alam believes startups truly make a dent in the world. 

And this dent is something that should be recorded, documented, and celebrated.

That’s exactly what Startup Pedia does.

Every. Single. Day.

name: Startup Story®
specialties: Startup Story, Entrepreneurs, Stories and news of startups, SMBs, Research, Reports, Expert Insights, Resource Articles, Founders Interviews, Campaigns and Promotions, Visibility and Connections, Startup Events, Startup Jobs, Startup Stories, Founders Stories, Startup Ideas, StartupStory Tv- collection of best entrepreneurs videos
description:
Startup Story is on a mission to amplify the voices of startups and make their stories resonate with the world. We believe that every startup has a unique tale to tell, and we're dedicated to creating a platform that not only showcases their journeys but also inspires the next generation of entrepreneurs.

Our vision is to empower young minds to pursue their entrepreneurial dreams by shining a spotlight on their remarkable achievements. We understand that entrepreneurship knows no boundaries, and that's why we are committed to being inclusive and embracing startups from all regions. Whether they emerge from bustling cities or untapped tier 2 and 3 areas, we believe in giving every entrepreneur the opportunity to be heard and celebrated.

Through our platform, we bring to light the challenges, triumphs, and invaluable lessons that go into building a successful business. These stories serve as a powerful source of education and inspiration for a wider audience, shedding light on the untold stories of perseverance, resilience, and innovation.

In particular, we have a special focus on entrepreneurs hailing from tier 2 and 3 cities. We understand the unique hurdles they face and are determined to provide them with the recognition and support they deserve. By giving these budding entrepreneurs a voice, we aim to bridge the gap and bring them one step closer to achieving their dreams.

At Startup Story, we believe in the transformative power of storytelling. We are dedicated to nurturing a vibrant startup ecosystem, where every entrepreneur is given the platform they need to thrive. Join us in our journey of discovery, inspiration, and empowerment as we unlock the potential of startups and pave the way for a brighter future of entrepreneurship. Together, let's celebrate the resilience and creativity of startups, and make their stories an inspiration for generations to come.
